Predictions from a spatial quantile mixture model

Source: R/predict.R
predict.spmixqr.Rd

Predictions from a spatial quantile mixture model

Usage

# S3 method for class 'spmixqr'
predict(
  object,
  newdata = NULL,
  newcoords = NULL,
  type = c("prob", "class", "posterior", "quantile", "quantile_byclass"),
  ...
)

Arguments

object

A fitted spmixqr object.

newdata

Optional data frame of predictors. If NULL, in-sample.

newcoords

Coordinates (point: two-column) or region labels (areal) for newdata. Required when newdata is supplied and the model is spatial.

type

One of "prob" (gate probabilities over space, n x G), "class" (most probable regime by the gate), "posterior" (responsibilities; needs the response in newdata), "quantile" (gate-mixed conditional quantile), or "quantile_byclass" (per-regime conditional quantile, n x G).

...

Ignored.

Value

A vector or matrix depending on type.

On this page
